tests.test_name: Stale frontend shows update modal when Analyze is clicked
tests.description: When a user tries to analyze a test file but their frontend is out of date, they are shown a modal prompting them to reload and get the latest version.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The system detects that the user's frontend version does not match the backend

test_coverage.verification_step: User selects format and role, uploads a file, and clicks Analyze
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The version check is triggered as part of the normal analysis workflow, not just on page load
Users are clearly informed that their version is stale and action is required before they can proceed
Users have a clear, one-click path to refresh and get the latest frontend version
